title: How One Boundary Keeps a Godly Man's Impulses From Running Him
caption:
You don't lose to temptation at the moment it shows up. You lose in the ten seconds before, when the line was never drawn.

A godly man doesn't run his life by willpower in the moment. He runs it by decisions made earlier, when he was calm enough to mean them. Name the line tonight. Put friction between you and it. Hand it to a brother so it's not just yours to keep.

One boundary, actually held, is worth more than ten good intentions.

#faith #selfcontrol #discipline #christianman #godlyman #accountability
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
